panels.text: 06/07/26 All CUBE repos have been migrated to GHE and pipelines relinked to use GHE. Migration of Acin, Kodex and 4C Risk repos is to be scheduled and completed. 2 Acin repos have been migrated. These will be reviewed and the remained scheduled. Kodex to be migrated 20 and 21 July. Discussion to be held with 4C regarding migration dates. The target to complete pipeline migration is end of August. A template pipeline will be created and shared with the teams, with the initial step to create documentation for this.

06/07/26     Azure Migrate has been set up to assess migration of Content VMs to Azure. Work to migrate Dev and Test databases to Azure SQL MI initiated, currently paused. Calls with Microsoft Factory team held, they are able to support and carry out the migration of VMs. Content migration to Kubernetes is also being progressed, however there is a resourcing risk associated with achieving this.
06/07/26 ProtonVPN has been onboarded. Ticket for Proton VPN subscription -        to action set up of Proton VPN.

Systran v10 and the Translation API are live since June 2.   This includes autoscaling, scaling groups for language sets, and detailed translation dashboards aviliable in new relic. Only remaining thing is the move of RDM from direct systran communication to the new API

ISO Certification Awarded -  Non conformance documentation to be submitted by Jul1st to secure certification    Audit ongoing - Interviews with 12 + teams across Cube including Legal, People, Infrastructure, Cloud, Security.  Expect to receive OFIs at a minimum   Audit dates confirmed Stage 1 22  and 23 April.  State 2 June 11th to 18th April.  Ongoing remediation of vulnerabilities across container packages, endpoints, servers in progress.  Reduced from peak of 200k to100k  currently.    Vulnerability Management Forum set up.  Still lot of work to do.  Machines to be decommissioned (VDIs etc.) - nearly complete Vendor supplier reviews (Critical) completed using Vanta.   InfoSec Risk register uploaded to vanta.   Risk Treatment procedure to be reviewed.   All other risks across Cube have been added to the register.  meetings to be set up with Executive leads.     Internal audit with Ash complete - findings to be addressed.  No major non conformities identified. Minor non conformities to be addressed in infosec session.  ISMS Documentation complete and policies uploaded for employee acknowledgement - 33% have completed the task.  Secure Code training rolled out to Development teams from Vanta - 100 % Complete Security training rolled out to all employees 24/02/2026 - 80% completion rate.  Cyber Training for new starters to be followed up  Vulnerability Scanning tool for web applications, Tenable, deployed by Ash Cyber  Remaining scope  for Content Engineering:  CUBE ISO27001 certification - remaining scope - Content Platform - Confluence

Status: AI handover documentation complete. Insights: Documentation in progress. Books handover: consolidating into Sri Lanka. Doco later. RDM/RDI insights: starting after security fixes. RDM/RDI books: starting after security fixes.
Decision on forward direction of Cube data pipelines needed for migration tasks of RDM team. Java replacement seems improbable at this point.

items.summary: Content Alerts for P1 and P2

panels.text: Status : in-progress   Alert Register   Completed for RegBrain AI services as of      Insight and Book pipeline have key alerts in place.   Still to enhance RDM, book pipeline. Target end May 2026
Status : Moving caching to config almost done. Site cookies feature delayed until Jan-Feb. Will look at it in March, as there’s security audit work to do that’s more important
Status:  Cache and XML stamping APIs complete.   IB Master data phase 1 mostly complete (a couple of minor issues to resolve) Other items in a backlog for later consideration
